target.title: Control-plane hardening from Optimus ops findings
target.body:
## Summary

Completes the OpenClaw control-plane hardening project stack from Optimus ops findings:

- ADP-237: structured A2A handoff IDs and return-route tracing
- ADP-238: native incident ledger and repair audit trail
- ADP-239: regression baseline capture and postflight compare
- ADP-240: staggered channel startup with isolated probe cache
- ADP-241: plugin contract validator and startup diagnostics surface
- ADP-242: expected custom service wrapper config/reporting
- ADP-243: unified `openclaw diagnose --json` control-plane API

Maintainer/ClawSweeper follow-up in latest head `efb3c567ed`:

- `diagnose --json` now produces real runtime evidence while it reports: it captures/saves `diagnose-latest`, executes the plugin contract validator through the probe cache, and records a redacted diagnose incident when task/plugin checks fail.
- QA channel metadata is manifest-sourced again through `getChatChannelMeta("qa-channel")`.
- Incident repair circuit breaker now counts consecutive failures, not total historical failures.
- Incident ledger persistence redacts details, repair errors, and before/after state before writing JSONL.
- Added focused diagnose and incident-ledger regression coverage.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Validate the new control-plane hardening surfaces from a real local OpenClaw checkout: plugin contract validation, unified diagnose JSON, A2A provenance handoff fields, baseline/probe-cache inventory, incident ledger, service wrapper diagnostics, and the maintainer-review fixes for supported RPCs, redacted diagnose/ledger behavior, manifest-sourced QA metadata, probe-cache failure association, and consecutive repair-failure handling.

Real environment tested: Local macOS OpenClaw development checkout on this PR branch at `efb3c567ed`, using the configured local OpenClaw state and installed bundled/user plugins. Commands were run from the repository root with the local gateway/config environment after rebuilding the branch. No destructive doctor repairs, service restarts, live plugin updates, production channel startup, or credential rotation were run.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

1. `CI=true pnpm lint --threads=8`
2. `CI=true pnpm tsgo:core`
3. `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/probes/cache.test.ts src/incidents/ledger.test.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts src/daemon/service-audit.test.ts src/plugins/contract-validator.test.ts src/commands/diagnose.test.ts`
4. `pnpm build`
5. `node dist/entry.js plugins contracts validate --strict --json`
6. `timeout 30s node dist/entry.js diagnose --json --timeout 1000`
7. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.sessions-send.test.ts`
8. `git diff --check`

Evidence after fix:

```text
$ CI=true pnpm lint --threads=8
[oxlint:core] finished
[oxlint:extensions] finished
[oxlint:scripts] finished
```

```text
$ CI=true pnpm tsgo:core
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo
```

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/probes/cache.test.ts src/incidents/ledger.test.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts src/daemon/service-audit.test.ts src/plugins/contract-validator.test.ts src/commands/diagnose.test.ts
[test] passed 5 Vitest shards in 16.64s
```

```text
$ pnpm build
OK: All 4 required plugin-sdk exports verified.
```

```json
$ node dist/entry.js plugins contracts validate --strict --json
{
  "ok": true,
  "strict": true,
  "pluginCount": 125,
  "findingCount": 30,
  "findings": [
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "browser" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "canvas" },

    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "memory-core" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "memory-lancedb" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "memory-wiki" },

    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "tavily" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "voice-call" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "zalouser" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "qqbot" },
    { "level": "warn", "code": "tool-contract-without-metadata", "pluginId": "lossless-claw" }
  ]
}
```

```json
$ timeout 30s node dist/entry.js diagnose --json --timeout 1000
{
  "ok": true,
  "status": {
    "gateway": {
      "port": 18789,
      "mode": "local",
      "bind": "loopback",
      "controlUi": { "allowInsecureAuth": false },
      "trustedProxies": ["127.0.0.1", "::1"],
      "tailscale": { "mode": "off", "resetOnExit": false },
      "nodes": { "denyCommands": [] }
    },
    "configuredChannels": 2,
    "configuredAgents": 2
  },
  "plugins": {
    "contracts": {
      "ok": true,
      "strict": true,
      "pluginCount": 125,
      "findingCount": 30
    }
  },
  "tasks": {
    "count": 0,
    "filteredCount": 0,
    "displayed": 0,
    "summary": {
      "total": 0,
      "warnings": 0,
      "errors": 0,
      "combined": { "total": 0, "errors": 0, "warnings": 0 }
    },
    "findings": []
  },
  "baselines": {
    "count": 1,
    "latest": "diagnose-latest",
    "current": {
      "components": {
        "gateway": { "status": "pass", "message": "Gateway responded" },
        "channels": { "status": "warn", "message": "((intermediate value) ?? []).filter is not a function" },
        "agents": { "status": "pass", "message": "0 agents" },
        "tasks": { "status": "pass", "message": "0 active tasks" },
        "locks": { "status": "pass", "message": "No locks" },
        "plugins": { "status": "pass", "message": "125 plugins loaded" }
      },
      "metrics": {
        "sessionCount": 1,
        "agentCount": 0,
        "channelCount": 1,
        "activeTaskCount": 0
      }
    },
    "recent": ["diagnose-latest"]
  },
  "probeCache": {
    "count": 1,
    "stale": 0,
    "recent": [
      { "type": "plugin", "id": "contracts", "stale": false }
    ]
  },
  "incidents": {
    "count": 0,
    "open": 0,
    "frozen": 0,
    "repairs": 0,
    "recent": []
  },
  "actions": {
    "safe": [
      "openclaw health --json",
      "openclaw gateway status --json",
      "openclaw tasks audit --json",
      "openclaw plugins contracts validate --strict --json"
    ],
    "unsafe": [
      "openclaw doctor --fix",
      "openclaw gateway restart",
      "openclaw plugins update --all"
    ]
  }

```

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.sessions-send.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       3 passed (3)
```

```text
$ git diff --check
(no output)
```

Observed result after fix: The local OpenClaw setup accepted the new gateway input provenance fields, plugin contract validation completed with `ok:true`, and diagnose emitted the nested current-head control-plane JSON shape. Diagnose now writes and reports `diagnose-latest`, records the plugin-contract probe in `probeCache`, reports task audit, baseline, probe cache, incident counts, and action hints, omits gateway auth metadata, and reports zero open incidents and zero task errors in this environment.

What was not tested: I did not run destructive doctor repairs, service restarts, live plugin updates, production channel startup, or credential rotation. Those are intentionally listed as unsafe actions by `openclaw diagnose` and are outside this PR's non-destructive validation path.

## Validation

- `CI=true pnpm lint --threads=8`
- `CI=true pnpm tsgo:core`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/probes/cache.test.ts src/incidents/ledger.test.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts src/daemon/service-audit.test.ts src/plugins/contract-validator.test.ts src/commands/diagnose.test.ts`
- `pnpm build`
- `node dist/entry.js plugins contracts validate --strict --json`
- `timeout 30s node dist/entry.js diagnose --json --timeout 1000`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.sessions-send.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Notes

The upstream repository is creator/maintainer-owned. This code is submitted from the accessible `fchaudhryspear/openclaw` fork for maintainer review rather than attempting direct writes to `openclaw/openclaw`.
target.author: fchaudhryspear
